body:
Add Pydantic validators for all API inputs. Currently no validation on string lengths, enum constraints, email formats, or budget ranges.

**Scope:**
- Validate all FastAPI/Flask endpoint inputs with Pydantic models
- Add string length limits, enum constraints, email format validation
- Sanitize all user-facing inputs before DB queries
- Return structured error responses (not raw exceptions)

**Files:** consulting_api.py (ProjectInquiry), student_api.py, showcase_api.py, all portal APIs
title: refactor: add input validation on all API endpoints
